query:
SELECT name, primaryColor, secondaryColor, tertiaryColor 
FROM ncaam_teams 
WHERE LOWER(name) LIKE '%high point%';

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_teams, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN primaryColor IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_primary,
  SUM(CASE WHEN secondaryColor IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_secondary
FROM ncaam_teams;

SELECT name, primaryColor, secondaryColor, tertiaryColor 
FROM ncaam_teams 
WHERE primaryColor IS NULL OR primaryColor = ''
ORDER BY name
LIMIT 30;
